channel.title: Farmmily Boutique Products
channel.description: Premium Heritage Mangoes, A2 Ghee & Raw Honey from our private estates.

item.g:title: Imam Pasand Mangoes - 3kg Elite Crate
item.g:description: Hand-picked, sun-ripened heritage Imam Pasand mangoes from our Mambalam estates.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Fruits & Vegetables > Fresh & Frozen Fruits

item.g:title: Alphonso Mangoes - 3kg Heritage Crate
item.g:description: The King of mangoes, sweet and creamy Alphonso direct from our farm.
item.g:google_product_category: Food, Beverages & Tobacco > Food Items > Fruits & Vegetables > Fresh & Frozen Fruits
